How much calcium is in 1 cup of fortified oat milk versus what FDC stores (per 100g)? Show the conversion and disclose whether a labelNutrients field is present.

Vitamin D in FDC can be expressed as nutrient 324 (IU) or nutrient 1110 (mcg). If a branded food only has nutrient 1110, how should the skill report the value, and what conversion to IU should be shown?
